terminos.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
terminos.s1Body:
Bimex is a social impact crowdfunding platform built on the Stellar network using Soroban smart contracts. Contributors deposit MXNe (Mexican stable peso pegged 1:1 to MXN) into verified social projects. Deposited capital remains under the control of the smart contract, not the platform.

The yield generated by the capital (through CETES via Etherfuse and the Stellar AMM) is used to fund the social project throughout its duration. When the project ends, each contributor recovers exactly the amount they contributed, regardless of project performance.
terminos.s2Body:
Contributions made on Bimex do NOT constitute regulated investments under Mexican securities law or any other financial authority in Mexico or abroad. No shares, equities, ownership rights, or securities are granted over the project or the platform.

Contributors do not receive financial returns on their capital. All yield generated is allocated entirely to the social project. The return of capital at project completion does not constitute a profit or financial return for the contributor, but rather the recovery of their original deposit.

Bimex is not a credit institution, brokerage firm, SAPI, or Savings and Loan Cooperative.
terminos.s3Body:
Bimex uses the Stellar network and Soroban smart contracts. By using the platform, the user acknowledges and accepts the following risks:

- Network risk: Stellar may experience congestion, forks, protocol upgrades, or attacks that affect service availability or security.
- Smart contract risk: Although the contract code has been tested, no software is free from errors or vulnerabilities. There is no guarantee that the contract is free of bugs that could result in loss of funds.
- Irreversibility risk: Transactions on Stellar are irreversible once confirmed. Errors in entering addresses or amounts cannot be reversed by Bimex or any authority.
- Regulatory risk: Regulation of digital assets and crowdfunding is evolving. Regulatory changes could affect Bimex's operation or users' ability to access their funds.
- MXNe token risk: MXNe is a stable token issued by Etherfuse. Its stability depends on the correct operation of the issuer and underlying reserve mechanisms.
terminos.s4Body:
The user is solely responsible for:

- Custody of their Freighter wallet and private key. Bimex will never ask for your private key or seed phrase.
- Accuracy of entered wallet addresses.
- Keeping their system secure (antimalware, updates, strong passwords).
- Complying with their local tax obligations arising from use of the platform.
- Not using the platform for illegal activities, money laundering, or terrorist financing.
terminos.s5Body:
Bimex, its developers, contributors, and associated entities shall not be liable for:

- Loss of funds due to user error, loss of private keys, or unauthorized access to the user's wallet.
- Indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the platform.
- Losses caused by smart contract errors, bugs, or vulnerabilities.
- Losses caused by force majeure events, including but not limited to cyber attacks, natural disasters, or regulatory changes.
- Any use third parties make of public information stored on the blockchain.

Capital contributed to projects is always recoverable when the project ends, subject to the conditions established in the smart contract.
terminos.s6Body:
These Terms and Conditions are governed by the laws of the United Mexican States. Any dispute related to the use of the platform shall be submitted to the jurisdiction of the competent courts in Mexico City, with the user waiving any other jurisdiction that may apply.

For inquiries or disputes, contact: legal@bimex.app

privacidad.title: Privacy Notice
privacidad.s1Body:
Bimex collects the following personal data:

- Stellar wallet address: obtained when you connect your Freighter wallet to the platform.
- Email address: voluntarily provided when activating email notifications.
- Transaction data: Bimex indexes and stores public Stellar blockchain events related to the smart contract.

Bimex does NOT collect your name, physical address, date of birth, government ID, tax ID, or any identification documents. Documents uploaded during project creation (ID, plan, budget) are processed locally and only a SHA-256 digital fingerprint is stored on the blockchain.
privacidad.s2Body:
The collected data is used to:

- Facilitate wallet connection and display your information on the platform.
- Send email notifications (if you activated this option) about your project status.
- Display aggregate statistics and public transparency data.
- Improve the platform and diagnose technical issues.

Emails are stored in Supabase, our database and authentication provider. Wallet addresses and transaction data are public by nature as they are recorded on the Stellar blockchain.
privacidad.s3Body:
All transactions made through the Bimex smart contract are recorded on the Stellar blockchain, which is a public and decentralized ledger. This means that:

- Your wallet address and transaction history with Bimex are publicly visible.
- Data cannot be deleted or modified once confirmed on the blockchain.
- Anyone can view the smart contract's transaction history using a block explorer.

By using Bimex, you accept that this information is public.
privacidad.s4Body:
Under the Mexican Federal Law for the Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties (LFPDPPP), you have the right to:

- Access: Request information Bimex holds about you.
- Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
- Cancellation: Request deletion of your personal data when no longer necessary for the stated purposes.
- Opposition: Object to the processing of your data for specific purposes.

To exercise your ARCO rights, contact privacidad@bimex.app. We will respond within a maximum of 20 business days as required by LFPDPPP.

Important: Data recorded on the Stellar blockchain cannot be modified or deleted due to the immutable nature of distributed ledger technology.
privacidad.s5Body:
The data controller is:

Bimex Platform
Email: privacidad@bimex.app
Mexico City, Mexico

For any questions about this privacy notice, data processing, or to exercise your ARCO rights, contact us at privacidad@bimex.app.

step1.title: Your connected wallet
step1.content: This is your connected wallet. Your Stellar address appears here securely.

step2.title: Explore impact projects
step2.content: Here you'll find verified social impact projects. Each one shows its goal and real-time progress.

step3.title: Contribute with MXNe
step3.content: Click on a project to see full details and contribute with MXNe. Your capital is always recoverable.

step4.title: You're on Testnet
step4.content: You're on testnet — use the faucet button to get free test MXNe and experiment risk-free.

step5.title: Your personal account
step5.content: Here you can see all your contributions, created projects, and the yield you've generated.
